name: San Fernando Loan Co Inc
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop since 1946 in San Fernando, CA offering quick confidential loans and buying/selling of jewelry, firearms, and musical instruments.
description_long:
San Fernando Jewelry & Loan Co is a family-owned pawn shop established in 1946, located at 1131 San Fernando Rd in San Fernando, California near the intersection of San Fernando Rd and San Fernando Mission Blvd. The business operates as a traditional pawnbroker with deep roots in the local community spanning nearly 80 years.

The company offers three primary services: buying merchandise of value, selling items from inventory, and providing collateral-based loans. They specialize specifically in jewelry, firearms, and musical instruments. Customers can obtain quick, easy, and confidential loans using these items as collateral, and the shop also purchases unwanted jewelry and gold directly. Their stated mission is to provide top dollar valuations for customer merchandise.

San Fernando Jewelry & Loan Co distinguishes itself through its long operational history, specialization in three distinct merchandise categories (rather than general pawn operations), and emphasis on customer comfort and confidentiality. The business maintains a clean, well-organized physical location with friendly staff according to customer reviews. They are accessible to customers and operate extended hours Tuesday through Saturday (9:30 AM - 5:30 PM).

Customer reviews reveal mixed experiences. Positive reviews highlight large inventory, friendly staff, fair pricing, and good organization. However, recent negative reviews cite poor customer service, low valuations, and serious complaints about items being sold after customers paid redemption amounts. The 3.5-star rating reflects polarized sentiment with 6 five-star reviews offset by 5 one-star reviews. Potential customers should research current operational practices and verify transactions carefully before conducting business.
address: 1131 San Fernando Rd, San Fernando, CA 91340

company_info.headquarters: 1131 San Fernando Rd, San Fernando, CA 91340

pros: Family-owned business established in 1946 with nearly 80 years of operational history
Specializes in three specific merchandise categories: jewelry, firearms, and musical instruments
Offers quick, easy, and confidential loans with no credit check required
Large inventory across jewelry, firearms, and musical instruments according to reviews
Clean, well-organized shop with accessible location near San Fernando Rd and San Fernando Mission Blvd
Extended business hours Tuesday-Saturday (9:30 AM - 5:30 PM) for customer convenience
Purchases jewelry and gold directly at stated competitive valuations
cons: Recent customer complaints about poor service and dismissive staff behavior
Serious allegations in reviews of items being sold after customers paid redemption amounts
Reported to BBB and DOJ by at least one customer regarding merchandise disputes
Mixed 3.5-star rating with 5 one-star reviews indicating inconsistent service quality
Low valuations reported by some customers attempting to sell items
best_for: Customers in San Fernando, CA needing immediate collateral-based loans without credit checks
Individuals looking to sell or pawn jewelry, firearms, or musical instruments
People seeking quick cash using valuable items as collateral
Local community members familiar with the business's 80-year history
diagnosis: San Fernando Jewelry & Loan Co is best for borrowers in the San Fernando area who need immediate cash and own valuable jewelry, firearms, or musical instruments to use as collateral. The main caveat is that recent customer reviews indicate serious service quality concerns and unresolved disputes about merchandise, so verify current business practices and document all transactions carefully before engaging with the shop.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans on jewelry, firearms, and musical instruments
Quick and confidential loans without credit requirements
Purchase of unwanted jewelry and gold at stated competitive rates
Sale of jewelry from store inventory
Sale of firearms from store inventory
Sale of musical instruments from store inventory
